{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Gold dreadbeasts
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Gold dreadbeasts]] are attacking a fortress.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Truegold]] [[dreadbeasts]] can be sliced in half by an [[Archlord]] [[flying sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
